name: Paramount Bank
description_short: Community bank in North County St. Louis offering checking, savings, CDs, and home loans with a focus on personalized service and local wealth-building.
description_long: Paramount Bank is a community-focused financial institution serving the North County St. Louis area, explicitly positioning itself as an alternative to large national banks. The bank emphasizes local engagement and generational wealth building for their geographic community. Founded on principles of creativity, care, and commitment to doing what they do well, Paramount operates from their headquarters at 90 Village Square Shopping Center in Hazelwood, MO. The bank offers a range of personal banking products including Interest Checking accounts (currently 2% APY up to $100,000), Certificates of Deposit (with rates varying by term and balance tier), Money Market accounts, and Personal Savings options. They also provide home lending services including conventional mortgages, VA loans, FHA loans, and non-conforming loans, with dedicated home loan experts and an online application process. The bank operates multiple service channels including drive-through, lobby appointments, and digital banking platforms with mobile accessibility. Paramount distinguishes itself through relationship-based banking rather than transactional banking. Their website emphasizes expert guidance, constant communication, and personalized attention to financial goals. They highlight five-star home loan reviews and customer testimonials praising their professionalism and above-and-beyond service. The bank positions community commitment as central to their mission, explicitly stating they serve North County STL residents with personalized attention regardless of account size. The bank is FDIC insured (Member FDIC) and maintains proper regulatory licensing (NMLS: 551907, ABA Routing Number: 081019117). However, they are a smaller regional institution with limited geographic reach, operating only in the North County St. Louis area. Commercial banking services are listed as "Coming Soon," suggesting incomplete product offerings. Their service hours have limitations (Wednesday lobby is appointment-only), which may inconvenience some customers.
services: Interest Checking accounts with 2% APY (up to $100,000 balance)
Online account opening and digital banking
Home loan guidance and application processing
Mortgage rate comparison and consultation services
pros: Competitive Interest Checking rate of 2% APY for balances up to $100,000 with $100 minimum deposit
Personalized service model with dedicated home loan experts emphasizing constant communication
FDIC insured with proper regulatory compliance (NMLS 551907)
Five-star home loan reviews and positive customer testimonials about responsiveness and professionalism
Digital banking platform available 24/7 for convenient account access
Multiple service channels including drive-through (8 AM-4 PM weekdays) and online options
Explicit community focus on North County St. Louis with wealth-building mission
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to North County St. Louis area only
Wednesday lobby operations are appointment-only, reducing accessibility on that day
Commercial banking services still listed as "Coming Soon," indicating incomplete product development
Limited information about monthly fees, overdraft policies, and other account restrictions on website
Smaller institution means potentially fewer branch locations and limited ATM network compared to major banks

contact.address: 90 Village Square Shop Ctr, Hazelwood, MO 63042

best_for: North County St. Louis residents seeking personalized banking relationships over transactional services
Home buyers/borrowers who value detailed guidance and constant communication through the mortgage process
Savers looking for competitive interest-bearing checking accounts with relatively accessible deposit minimums
Consumers prioritizing community-focused banking and local wealth-building over national bank convenience
diagnosis: Paramount Bank is best suited for North County St. Louis residents who prioritize personalized banking relationships and value community focus over the convenience and breadth of major national banks. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation—the bank only serves the North County St. Louis area, making it inaccessible to consumers outside that region, and their smaller size means potentially fewer ATM locations and limited product depth compared to larger institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 90 Village Square Shop Ctr, Hazelwood, MO 63042
fdic_mdi_status: Minority Board and Serving Multi-Racial Community
